sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n276" key="a)gai=os2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγαῖος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype> (B), (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἄγω</etym>) <sense id="n276.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">leading the procession,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μόσχος,</foreign> dub. in <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">SIG2</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4099.tlg001:438:203" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">438.203</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Delphi</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
